method: vitest unit + integration tests drive every testable behavior contract. 3 browser-only QUOTA assertions batch with the deferred Playwright pass at end-of-mission. Local Supabase Realtime verified at the wire-protocol level via migration; live UI confirmation happens in the browser pass.

VAL-QUOTA-001.evidence: message-quota.test.ts verifies RPC invocation with (p_user_id=owner, p_limit=plan)

VAL-QUOTA-002.evidence: 402 + upgrade_url returned; embed() mock asserts zero calls

VAL-QUOTA-003.evidence: usage-counters-schema.test.ts 20-parallel property — exactly 10 oks at budget=10

VAL-QUOTA-005.evidence: crawl-quota.test.ts — 402 at/over limit; Firecrawl SDK never instantiated

VAL-QUOTA-007.evidence: Component mounted on /dashboard; buildMeterSet returns 3 rows in fixed order; browser screenshot pending

VAL-QUOTA-008.evidence: Realtime channel wired (filter: user_id=eq.X on usage_counters UPDATE); cross-tab <3s SLA needs browser test

VAL-QUOTA-009.evidence: Realtime updates numerator; cap refresh currently via reload after BillingAction; Playwright needed

VAL-QUOTA-010.evidence: message-quota handoff inherits from M2F3 idempotency; quota-reset.test.ts duplicate-event test confirms

VAL-QUOTA-011.evidence: API returns 402 + upgrade_url; widget-side generic-wording UI deferred to M8 hardening-launch

VAL-QUOTA-013.evidence: UsageMeterSet mounted inside billing plan card; Playwright confirmation pending but placement verified by typecheck + code review

VAL-QUOTA-014.evidence: buildMeterSet({counter:null}) returns {used:0, percent:0} per unit test; browser screenshot of empty /dashboard pending

VAL-QUOTA-015.evidence: buildMeterSet overshoot clamp test — used:2500 against limit:2000 -> percent:100

crossMilestoneReconfirms.VAL-BILLING-014: usage_counters reset fully landed; flipped from pending->passed in validation-state.
crossMilestoneReconfirms.VAL-RLS-015: usage_counters table exists; cross-user SELECT isolation proven; flipped from pending->passed.

discoveredFollowUps: Playwright pass covers VAL-QUOTA-008/009/011/014 alongside M2's deferred UI assertions + foundation's deferred AUTH assertions — single batched browser run at end-of-mission.
VAL-QUOTA-011 widget-degradation UI lands naturally with the M8 graceful-widget-degradation feature (VAL-DEGRADE-003 shares the 402 path).

Two-step crawl_pages_used increment in processCrawlData should be converted to an atomic UPDATE ... SET crawl_pages_used = crawl_pages_used + N when M8 hardening runs. Low risk today because crawl completion is serialized per site.
result: PASS — milestone sealed. 12/15 passed via unit+integration; 3 deferred to the aggregated Playwright pass with documented paths.
